# Specs

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory holds implementation-level specs for active and recent work in `contentful-management.java`.

## Conventions

- File naming: `YYYY-MM-DD-<short-description>.md`
- Each spec should document: what is being built, why, the proposed API surface or behavior, and any open questions.
- Mark completed work with `status: done` in the spec frontmatter or a note at the top.
- Specs are inputs to Golden Context — if a spec captures a durable decision, promote it to an ADR in `docs/ADRs/`.

## Active Specs

_No active specs yet. Add one when starting a new feature or significant change._
